properties.description: Accordion groups a collection of contents in tabs.
properties.name: Accordion

properties.description: AutoComplete is an input component that provides real-time suggestions when being typed.
properties.name: AutoComplete

properties.description: Avatar represents people using icons, labels and images.
properties.name: Avatar

properties.description: Badge is a small status indicator for another element.
properties.name: Badge

properties.description: BlockUI can either block other components or the whole page.
properties.name: BlockUI

properties.description: Breadcrumb provides contextual information about page hierarchy.
properties.name: Breadcrumb

properties.description: Button is an extension to standard button element with icons and theming.
properties.name: Button

properties.description: Card is a flexible container component.
properties.name: Card

properties.description: Carousel is a content slider featuring various customization options.
properties.name: Carousel

properties.description: CascadeSelect displays a nested structure of options.
properties.name: CascadeSelect

properties.description: Chart components are based on Charts.js 3.3.2+, an open source HTML5 based charting library.
properties.name: Chart

properties.description: Checkbox is an extension to standard checkbox element with theming.
properties.name: Checkbox

properties.description: Chip represents entities using icons, labels and images.
properties.name: Chip

properties.description: ColorPicker is an input component to select a color.
properties.name: ColorPicker

properties.description: ConfirmDialog is backed by a service utilizing Observables to display confirmation windows easily that can be shared by multiple actions on the same component.
properties.name: ConfirmDialog

properties.description: ConfirmPopup displays a confirmation overlay displayed relatively to its target.
properties.name: ConfirmPopup

properties.description: ContextMenu displays an overlay menu on right click of its target.
properties.name: ContextMenu

properties.description: DataView displays data in grid grid-cols-12 gap-4 or list layout with pagination and sorting features.
properties.name: DataView

properties.description: DatePicker is an input component to select a date.
properties.name: DatePicker

properties.description: Dialog is a container to display content in an overlay window.
properties.name: Dialog

properties.description: Divider is used to separate contents.
properties.name: Divider

properties.description: Dock is a navigation component consisting of menuitems.
properties.name: Dock

properties.description: pDraggable and pDroppable directives apply drag-drop behaviors to any element.
properties.name: Drag and Drop

properties.description: Drawer is a container component displayed as an overlay.
properties.name: Drawer

properties.description: Dialogs can be created dynamically with any component as the content using a DialogService.
properties.name: Dynamic Dialog

properties.description: Editor is rich text editor component based on Quill.
properties.name: Editor

properties.description: Fieldset is a grouping component with a content toggle feature.
properties.name: Fieldset

properties.description: FileUpload is an advanced uploader with dragdrop support, multi file uploads, auto uploading, progress tracking and validations.
properties.name: FileUpload

properties.description: FloatLabel appears on top of the input field when focused.
properties.name: Float Label

properties.description: Fluid is a layout component to make descendant components span full width of their container.
properties.name: Fluid

properties.description: Focus Trap keeps focus within a certain DOM element while tabbing.
properties.name: Focus Trap

properties.description: Galleria is an advanced content gallery component.
properties.name: Gallery

properties.description: IconField wraps an input and an icon.
properties.name: IconField

properties.description: IftaLabel is used to create infield top aligned labels.
properties.name: Ifta Label

properties.description: Displays an image with preview and tranformation options.
properties.name: Image

properties.description: Compare two images side by side with a slider.
properties.name: ImageCompare

properties.description: Inplace provides an easy to do editing and display at the same time where clicking the output displays the actual content.
properties.name: Inplace

properties.description: Text, icon, buttons and other content can be grouped next to an input.
properties.name: InputGroup

properties.description: InputMask component is used to enter input in a certain format such as numeric, date, currency and phone.
properties.name: InputMask

properties.description: InputNumber is an input component to provide numerical input.
properties.name: InputNumber

properties.description: Input Otp is used to enter one time passwords.
properties.name: Otp Input

properties.description: InputText is an extension to standard input element with theming and keyfiltering.
properties.name: InputText

properties.description: KeyFilter is a directive to restrict individual key strokes. In order to restrict the whole input, use InputNumber or InputMask instead.
properties.name: KeyFilter

properties.description: Knob is a form component to define number inputs with a dial.
properties.name: Knob

properties.description: Listbox is used to select one or more values from a list of items.
properties.name: Listbox

properties.description: MegaMenu is navigation component that displays submenus together.
properties.name: MegaMenu

properties.description: Menu is a navigation / command component that supports dynamic and static positioning.
properties.name: Menu

properties.description: Menubar is a horizontal menu component.
properties.name: Menubar

properties.description: Message component is used to display inline messages.
properties.name: Message

properties.description: MeterGroup displays scalar measurements within a known range.
properties.name: MeterGroup

properties.description: MultiSelect is used to select multiple items from a collection.
properties.name: MultiSelect

properties.description: OrderList is used to sort a collection.
properties.name: OrderList

properties.description: OrganizationChart visualizes hierarchical organization data.
properties.name: Organization Chart

properties.description: Paginator displays data in paged format and provides navigation between pages.
properties.name: Paginator

properties.description: Panel is a container component with an optional content toggle feature.
properties.name: Panel

properties.description: PanelMenu is a hybrid of Accordion and Tree components.
properties.name: PanelMenu

properties.description: Password displays strength indicator for password fields.
properties.name: Password

properties.description: PickList is used to reorder items between different lists.
properties.name: PickList

properties.description: Popover is a container component that can overlay other components on page.
properties.name: Popover

properties.description: ProgressBar is a process status indicator.
properties.name: ProgressBar

properties.description: ProgressSpinner is a process status indicator.
properties.name: ProgressSpinner

properties.description: RadioButton is an extension to standard radio button element with theming.
properties.name: RadioButton

properties.description: Rating component is a star based selection input.
properties.name: Rating

properties.description: Ripple directive adds ripple effect to the host element.
properties.name: Ripple

properties.description: VirtualScroller is a performance-approach to handle huge data efficiently.
properties.name: Virtual Scroller

properties.description: ScrollPanel is a cross browser, lightweight and skinnable alternative to native browser scrollbar.
properties.name: Scroll Panel

properties.description: ScrollTop gets displayed after a certain scroll position and used to navigates to the top of the page quickly.
properties.name: Scroll Top

properties.description: Select is used to choose an item from a collection of options.
properties.name: Select

properties.description: SelectButton is used to choose single or multiple items from a list using buttons.
properties.name: SelectButton

properties.description: Skeleton is a placeholder to display instead of the actual content.
properties.name: Skeleton

properties.description: Slider is a component to provide input with a drag handle.
properties.name: Slider

properties.description: SpeedDial is a floating button with a popup menu.
properties.name: Speed Dial

properties.description: SplitButton groups a set of commands in an overlay with a default action item.
properties.name: SplitButton

properties.description: Splitter is utilized to separate and resize panels.
properties.name: Splitter

properties.description: The Stepper component displays a wizard-like workflow by guiding users through the multi-step progression.
properties.name: Stepper

properties.description: StyleClass manages css classes declaratively to during enter/leave animations or just to toggle classes on an element.
properties.name: StyleClass

properties.description: Table displays data in tabular format.
properties.name: Table

properties.name: Tabs

properties.description: Tag component is used to categorize content.
properties.name: Tag

properties.description: Textarea adds styling and autoResize functionality to standard textarea element.
properties.name: Textarea

properties.description: TieredMenu displays submenus in nested overlays.

properties.description: Timeline visualizes a series of chained events.

properties.description: Toast is used to display messages in an overlay.

properties.description: ToggleButton is used to select a boolean value using a button.

properties.description: Toolbar is a grouping component for buttons and other content.

properties.description: Tooltip directive provides advisory information for a component. Tooltip is integrated within various PrimeNG components.

properties.description: Tree is used to display hierarchical data.
